redactionRules.disposition: Expose unchanged because the value is route- and vocabulary-scoped, not person-scoped.
source_refs: blueprint/accessibility-and-content-system-contract.md#semantic coverage alignment and PHI-safe state exposure

redactionRules.disposition: Expose unchanged because these are shared marker and posture refs, not content values.

source_refs: blueprint/accessibility-and-content-system-contract.md#semantic coverage alignment and PHI-safe state exposure

assumptions.statement: Diagnostic overlays and event envelopes may expose route, shell, posture, and vocabulary digests, but must suppress person, content, contact, and attachment-like fields.
assumptions.safeFallback: When a field name implies PHI or content detail, the console emits only `redacted::<digest>` and counts the redaction instead of showing the value.
source_refs: blueprint/accessibility-and-content-system-contract.md#semantic coverage alignment and PHI-safe state exposure
